top_signals.title: Italy rethinks EU defense-financing aid as arms spending falls out of fashion
top_signals.summary: Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni wants to refocus the bloc's help on lowering the cost of living for Italians, as energy costs have soared amid the Iran war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Why Cerebras CEO Andrew Feldman Built The World’s Largest Computer Chip
top_signals.summary: Bigger means faster in the world of AI chipmaking.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
